assertions.title: Playwright is the canonical e2e runner

steps.expected: Required e2e path uses Playwright and not bun tests/e2e/toolset-suite.ts
steps.observed: test:e2e is playwright test; test:run executes bun run test:e2e

steps.expected: CI test job executes path that routes e2e through Playwright
steps.observed: Workflow installs Playwright browser and runs bun run test:run

steps.action: Search required paths for legacy command

packageScripts: package.json:24 test:run = vitest run && uv run pytest && bun run test:e2e
evidence.legacyReferenceCheck: Grep found no tests/e2e/toolset-suite.ts in required paths

steps.observed: @playwright/test devDependency plus test:e2e and test:e2e:list scripts are present

steps.expected: Config defines scoped discovery excluding unit files

assertions.title: Playwright test discovery is non-empty and scoped

steps.expected: Non-zero discovered tests including core mission flows
Artifact render, approval flow(s), and persistence are listed
steps.observed: List includes artifact rendering, approval approve, approval deny, and persistence-after-reload tests

listOutput: artifact-approval.e2e.ts: validates artifact rendering flow with UI assertions
artifact-approval.e2e.ts: validates approval approve path completes with expected output evidence
artifact-approval.e2e.ts: validates approval deny path and rejects false-success output
artifact-approval.e2e.ts: keeps generated tool output visible after page reload in the same session
evidence.discoveryScope: playwright.config.ts testDir/testMatch restricts discovery to tests/playwright/**/*.e2e.ts

assertions.title: Deterministic e2e environment on approved ports

steps.expected: Backend 3100 and frontend 3101 with explicit readiness URLs
steps.observed: webServer commands use COVALT_BACKEND_PORT=3100 and PORT=3101 with urls http://localhost:3100/ and http://localhost:3101/

steps.action: Run scoped Playwright test with DEBUG=pw:webserver
steps.expected: Web servers start, readiness checks pass, and teardown occurs
steps.observed: Readiness probes, successful HTTP 200 availability checks, test pass, and explicit WebServer termination logs observed

config: playwright.config.ts:33/41 readiness URLs set for backend/frontend
runtimeLogs: pw:webserver HTTP GET: http://localhost:3100/ ... HTTP Status: 200
pw:webserver HTTP GET: http://localhost:3101/ ... HTTP Status: 200
pw:webserver Terminating the WebServer ... Terminated the WebServer (both processes)

assertions.title: Playwright diagnostics are actionable on failure

steps.action: Inspect reporter and artifact settings in playwright.config.ts
steps.expected: Human/machine-readable outputs and failure diagnostics enabled
steps.observed: reporters: list/html/json/junit; use: trace retain-on-failure, screenshot only-on-failure, video retain-on-failure

config: playwright.config.ts:26-28 trace/screenshot/video configured for failure triage

assertions.title: No confidence blackout during A -> B transition

steps.expected: Timeline documents active coverage during cutover steps
steps.observed: tests/artifacts/playwright/legacy-cutover-transition-timeline.json documents protected confidence windows across transition steps

steps.action: Cross-check ordered commits and changed files
steps.expected: Playwright required path and coverage appear during transition rather than an uncovered required path
steps.observed: 1f22ef1 switches required e2e runner to Playwright and adds discovery spec; later commits add core approval/artifact/persistence coverage

orderedCommits: 1f22ef1 feat(tests): establish Playwright e2e foundation and discovery
2301292 feat(tests): add Playwright artifact and approval core flows
4a2a9cb feat(tests): cover reload persistence and codify legacy cutover parity
a13ec91 feat(tests): assert approval completion output evidence
evidence.requiredPathState: package.json test:e2e is Playwright in current required path; no required legacy references found

steps.expected: Legacy confidence-critical scenarios map to Playwright specs or explicit drops
steps.observed: tests/artifacts/playwright/legacy-to-playwright-parity-matrix.json maps Toolset RenderPlan, Builtin Renderer Fallback, Approval Flow, and persistence scenarios to tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts

steps.action: Verify mapped Playwright spec titles exist
steps.expected: Referenced test cases are present in repository
steps.observed: Mapped test names are present in artifact-approval.e2e.ts

mappedSpecs: tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts:126 validates artifact rendering flow with UI assertions
tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts:150 validates approval approve path completes with expected output evidence
tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts:182 validates approval deny path and rejects false-success output
tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts:210 keeps generated tool output visible after page reload in the same session

assertions.title: Gate activation ordering avoids unprotected merge intervals

steps.action: Compare package.json before and after commit 1f22ef1
steps.expected: Legacy required e2e command removed only when Playwright required command is established
steps.observed: Before 1f22ef1 test:e2e used bun tests/e2e/toolset-suite.ts; after 1f22ef1 test:e2e uses playwright test

steps.action: Compare CI test workflow before and after commit 1f22ef1
steps.expected: Required CI path remains active and updated to support Playwright
steps.observed: Workflow retained bun run test:run and added Playwright browser install step

orderedDiffChecks: git show 1f22ef1^:package.json -> test:e2e legacy bun path
git show 1f22ef1^:.github/workflows/test.yml and 1f22ef1:.github/workflows/test.yml -> Playwright install added while test:run gate kept

frictions.description: A history-inspection command initially failed due shell printf flag parsing on a header string starting with hyphens.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran with quoted printf format (`printf '%s\n' ...`) and completed commit-diff evidence collection.

frictions.description: Playwright webServer readiness checks first attempted localhost via ::1 and logged transient ECONNREFUSED before backend/frontend startup completed.
frictions.resolution: Allowed configured readiness retry loop to continue until both services returned HTTP 200, then test execution proceeded and teardown completed cleanly.

commandsRun.observation: Discovered 5 tests in 2 files, including artifact/approval/persistence flows
Backend 3100 and frontend 3101 started via webServer with readiness checks and explicit termination logs; test passed
Confirmed required e2e command switched from legacy bun path to playwright test
Confirmed Playwright install step added while required test:run path remained active

commandsRun.command: git log --oneline --reverse -- package.json playwright.config.ts tests/playwright .github/workflows/test.yml .factory/services.yaml | tail -n 12
commandsRun.observation: Captured ordered migration commits: foundation -> core flows -> persistence/parity -> approve assertion fix

commandsRun.command: printf header + git show filters (first attempt)
commandsRun.observation: Initial command failed due printf option parsing; corrected and reran successfully

summary: Validated 8/8 assigned non-UI Playwright migration assertions as pass using repository config/scripts/history and deterministic command evidence. Canonical Playwright runner wiring, scoped discovery, approved-port readiness/teardown behavior, diagnostics/reporting configuration, and cross-transition parity/ordering artifacts were all confirmed with no blockers.
